description: Default analytics corpus: the 2026-07-11 population run (blind solve) + its no-solve rerun + forensic dossiers, joined with the 2026-07-12 hinted-cocoon assisted-solve deposits. Paths are repo-relative or absolute (D:\ artifact store); loadCorpus resolves relative paths against the repo root. ADDITIVE: append new runs' dirs/ledgers to these arrays when they land — never rewrite history.
